name: recordTelemetry
_note: Persists one named frame-time/hitstop telemetry sample into per-user STATE keyed by ctx.actor.userId; derives avgFrameMs/avgFps/p95/jankFrames + hitstop stats from the real samples. Non-finite/non-positive frame values are filtered; an empty resulting set fails-closed with 'no_frame_samples' (NEVER no_db). The assassin's internal owner actor writes a fresh row.
